TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Trevor_Ariza, title = Trevor_Ariza, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trevor_Ariza} }

S.FORM: Trevor Ariza hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 6, Trevor Ariza, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Trevor Ariza hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 6, Trevor Ariza, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tre*or ariza ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw / praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tre*or ariza, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
